svg.text: AI Hub Landing Zone - Network Environments
License Plate: da4cf6 | prod (4×/24) · test (2×/24) · dev (1×/24) | Subnets: privateendpoints-subnet*, apim-subnet, appgw-subnet, aca-subnet

g.text: VNet: 4× /24 address spaces (= /22 equivalent) | ~1,020 usable IPs | 3 PE spaces + 1 workload space
▸ PE Pool — 3 dedicated address spaces × /24 (~251 usable IPs each, ~50 tenants per subnet)
▸ Workload space — 1 address space /24 | apim-subnet /25 (123 usable) · appgw-subnet /26 (59 usable) · aca-subnet /27 (27 usable)
ALLOW VNet address spaces ↔ privateendpoints-subnet* (PE pool)
NOTE External peered projects: inbound apim-subnet:443 priority 400-499
NOTE Storage Account uses public access (no PE)
LOG All denied traffic → Log Analytics
VNet: 2× /24 | ~508 usable IPs · Space 1: dedicated PE /24 · Space 2: workload /24 (/27 subnets)
Integration testing | UAT | Performance tests | All tenants share single PE /24
Workload /24 unused range (10.x.x.96–255) reserved for future growth.
No PE overflow subnets in test — only one privateendpoints-subnet needed.
VNet: 1× /24 | ~81 usable IPs · 3 /27 subnets | appgw-subnet NOT deployed (appgw_enabled=false)
Developer sandbox | Rapid prototyping | APIM reachable directly over VNet (no App Gateway hop)
10.x.x.96–255 unused — reserved for appgw-subnet or future subnets when needed.

svg.text: Storage: public access (no PE in Landing Zone)

g.text: All subnet names are lowercase-with-hyphens (apim-subnet, not APIMSubnet). NSGs attached atomically at creation via azapi_resource (Landing Zone compliant).
Each tenant uses up to 6 PE IPs (Key Vault, AI Search, Cosmos DB ×2 IPs, Doc Intelligence, Speech). Storage Account has no PE. ~41 tenants fit per /24 PE subnet.
Tenant PE assignment (pe_subnet_key) is sticky — immutable after first deploy. Changing it destroys and recreates all tenant PEs. Prod max: ~123 tenants (3 PE subnets).

No AKS, Bastion, or Jumpbox subnets in this landing zone. Tools VNet (da4cf6-tools) is a separate peered spoke for CI/CD — not included in this allocation. External peered VNets reach apim-subnet directly (priority 400–499 NSG rules).

svg.text: AI Hub Landing Zone - Network Environments | Source: infra-ai-hub/modules/network/ · params/{env}/shared.tfvars
